records.title: New vendor commitment notification
records.text: Any new vendor commitment at or above the threshold requires board notification before signature.

records.title: High-value renewal review
records.text: Vendor commitments above the threshold require competitive review before renewal.

records.title: Renewal review lead time
records.text: High-value renewals require review before the renewal date.

records.title: Revenue-blocking controls first
records.text: Controls blocking contracted or late-stage revenue take priority over discretionary hiring.

records.title: Hiring funding basis
records.text: New roles require a funding basis tied to signed revenue, customer commitments, security remediation, or automation savings.

records.title: Unmatched vendor review
records.text: AP spend without a vendor record requires controller review before payment.

records.title: Usage true-up review
records.text: Vendor usage true-ups above 20 percent of monthly plan require budget owner attestation.

records.title: Customer evidence SLA
records.text: Customer security evidence requests blocking revenue require an owner and dated remediation plan.

records.title: Pipeline forecast refresh
records.text: Forecast assumptions should be refreshed when live weighted pipeline differs materially from plan.
